name: Flux Power Holdings, Inc.
summary: Flux Power Holdings, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells advanced lithium-ion energy storage solutions for industrial and commercial electrification, primarily targeting material handling (forklifts) and airport ground support equipment (GSE). Products include modular, scalable lithium-ion battery packs paired with a proprietary wireless battery management system (BMS) and SkyBMS telemetry platform, offering alternatives to traditional lead acid and propane-based energy solutions for large fleet customers.

products.name: Lithium-ion Energy Storage Solutions
products.description: Modular and scalable lithium-ion battery packs for material handling forklifts and airport ground support equipment, replacing lead acid and propane solutions.

products.name: SkyBMS (Telemetry Platform)
products.description: Proprietary wireless battery management and fleet telemetry system providing real-time monitoring, state of health reporting, and fleet asset management.

products.name: S-Series Battery Packs
products.description: Product line with UL Type EE certification, offering added safety and durability, available under OEM private label programs.

products.name: Mobile Energy Storage Systems
products.description: Modular battery packs adapted for broader industrial and commercial mobile energy storage applications beyond forklifts and GSE.

partnerships.description: Credit facility provider that Flux Power relies on for capital resources and to fund operations.

partnerships.partner_name: Unnamed largest critical battery components recycling company in the U.S.
partnerships.description: Partnership aimed at enhancing the recycling process for end-of-life lithium-ion batteries.
Second tier one OEM private label battery program added to supplement existing OEM relationships, covering the S-Series line.
